criteria.name: Versatility
criteria.description: The capability of the app to be applied to a variety of tasks and workflows.

criteria.name: Task Automation
criteria.description: The degree to which the app automates repetitive tasks, freeing up user time.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The ability of the app to seamlessly integrate with other tools and platforms.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The intuitiveness and ease of use of the app's interface and features.

criteria.name: AI Model
criteria.description: The type and sophistication of the AI models used by the app (e.g., GPT-4o, GPT-3.5).
